mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${target}(replyNum, num, member_id, content, parentNum, showReply, reg_date, block) VALUES (${target}_seq.NEXTVAL, #{num}, #{member_id}, #{content}, #{parentNum}, 1, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM ${target} WHERE num = #{num} AND parentNum = 0 AND block = 0
AND ( showReply = 1 OR member_id = #{member_id} )

SELECT r.replyNum, r.member_id, name, num, content, r.reg_date, showReply, profile_photo, NVL(answerCount, 0) answerCount, NVL(likeCount, 0) likeCount, NVL(disLikeCount, 0) disLikeCount FROM ${target} r JOIN member2 m ON r.member_id = m.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT parentNum, COUNT(*) answerCount FROM ${target} WHERE num = #{num} AND parentNum != 0 AND block = 0
AND ( showReply = 1 OR member_id = #{member_id} )
GROUP BY parentNum ) a ON r.replyNum = a.parentNum LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT replyNum, COUNT(DECODE(replyLike, 1, 1)) likeCount, COUNT(DECODE(replyLike, 0, 1)) disLikeCount FROM ${targetLike} GROUP BY replyNum ) c ON r.replyNum = c.replyNum WHERE num = #{num} AND r.parentNum = 0 AND r.block = 0
AND ( showReply = 1 OR r.member_id = #{member_id} )
ORDER BY r.replyNum DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM ${target} WHERE parentNum = #{parentNum} AND block = 0
AND ( showReply = 1 OR member_id = #{member_id} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ${target} SET showReply = #{showReply} WHERE replyNum = #{replyNum} AND member_id = #{member_id}
